title: Baby Personalised Elephant Comforter Blanket Soft Snuggly Animal Design (Pink Elephant)
features: These are gorgeous soft baby elephant comforter blankets, coming in several adorable colours.

The baby elephant comforters are super soft for baby's delicate skin. Featuring adorable elephant animal themed design. The comforter is the softest material, beautifully made, perfect for baby to snuggle with. The baby comforters are ideal for your baby or lovely as a gift for any newborn baby addition, baby shower, Christening, baby reveal and announcements.
You can choose to personalise the comforter especially for you, with babies name embroidered to the front of the comforter, making it a unique and special gift for baby and family.

PERSONALISED OPTION: You can choose to have the comforter personalised with a name to create a unique comforter! Choose the comforter you want and click Customize. Here you can choose if you want it personalised with a name or not.
description: Product Description Wrap Them in Warmth – Personalised Baby Gowns Soft, snuggly, and embroidered just for them. Designed for Cozy Moments After the bubbles and giggles, there’s nothing like wrapping them in a soft personalised robe. Our hooded gowns are made with plush materials and embroidered with love – making every bath-to-bed routine even more special. Custom Embroidery Add a personal touch that’s just theirs. Fluffy & Absorbent Premium material designed to dry and comfort fast. Gift-Ready Presentation Wrapped with love, ideal for baby showers and new arrivals.
